I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me analyze both fixes:

**Fix 1 (Line 1010):** `Button variant="secondary"` — The type changed to add `'stateful'` but `'secondary'` is still a valid value in the new type. No code change needed.

**Fix 2 (Line 998):** `Card isFlat` — The `isFlat` prop has been removed in PF v6. According to the Card family migration, `isFlat` should be removed. In PF v6, there's a `variant` prop with values `'default' | 'secondary'`. The `isFlat` style in PF v5 made the card have no shadow/flat appearance. In PF v6, the `isPlain` prop or `variant="secondary"` could serve as a replacement, but looking at the migration guide, `isFlat` is simply removed with no direct mapping. The card should just have `isFlat` removed since there's no direct equivalent — flat cards are the default in v6.

Let me apply the changes:
Now let me verify the final state of both affected areas:
Both areas look correct. Let me verify no imports need cleanup — `Card` is still used (just without `isFlat`), and `Button` is still used with `variant="secondary"`:

content.text:
Good — both `Card` and `Button` are still imported and used. No import cleanup needed.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type change (`secondary`)
**No change needed.** The value `"secondary"` remains valid in the new type signature (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`). The type change only *added* a new `'stateful'` variant; no existing values were removed.

### Fix 2 — `Card isFlat` removed prop
**Applied.** Removed the `isFlat` prop from `<Card>` on line 998. In PatternFly v6, the `isFlat` prop has been removed from the Card component. The flat (no-shadow) appearance is the default card style in v6, so simply removing the prop preserves the intended visual behavior. No other props, imports, or code required changes.

### Fix 3
Line: 1009
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Dropdown Family Migration
**No change needed.** All `DropdownItem` elements are already rendered inside `<DropdownList>` wrappers (lines 388, 546, 803, 815), satisfying the `sd-cf-dropdown-item-in-list` conformance rule. The `DropdownList` elements already contain `DropdownItem` children (via the `getPoolDropdownItems` helper and the `kmsProviderDropdownItems`/`kmsServiceDropdownItems` arrays), satisfying `sd-cf-dropdown-list-req-item`. The `onSelect` callbacks don't use the `value` parameter, so the type change from `string | number` to `DropdownItemProps['value']` is compatible. The `popperProps` object `{ width: 'trigger' }` is compatible with the new `PopperOptions` type.

### Fix 2 — CSS class `pf-v5-c-dropdown` removed (line 208)
**Applied.** Removed the `pf-v5-c-dropdown` class from the `className` prop on `ResourceDropdown` at line 208, keeping only the custom `dropdown--full-width` class. The `pf-v5-c-dropdown` class was removed in v6 with no equivalent `pf-v6-c-dropdown` class.

### Fix 3 — Button icon children to prop (line 1009)
**No change needed.** The `<Button>` at line 1009 contains only text children (`{t('Save')}`), not an icon element. There is no icon to move to the `icon` prop.

### Fix 4 — MenuToggle icon children to prop (lines 362, 514, 766, 780)
**No change needed.** All four `<MenuToggle>` instances contain only text children (pool names, provider group names, or placeholder strings). None contain icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`.

### Fix 5 — Dropdown transitive behavioral changes (line 77)
**No change needed.** This is an informational warning about Popper's `appendTo` default changing from `'inline'` to `() => document.body`. The file contains no tests; the Dropdown usage in this file is not affected since all dropdowns already use `popperProps={{ width: 'trigger' }}` and don't rely on the default `appendTo` behavior.

### Fix 6 — CSS class `pf-v5-c-dropdown` removed (line 208)
**Applied.** Same location as Fix 2 — both rules target the same `pf-v5-c-dropdown` class reference at line 208. Handled in a single edit.

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Dropdown Family Migration
**No change needed.** All `DropdownItem` elements are already rendered inside `<DropdownList>` wrappers (lines 388, 546, 803, 815), satisfying the `sd-cf-dropdown-item-in-list` conformance rule. The `DropdownList` elements already contain `DropdownItem` children (via the `getPoolDropdownItems` helper and the `kmsProviderDropdownItems`/`kmsServiceDropdownItems` arrays), satisfying `sd-cf-dropdown-list-req-item`. The `onSelect` callbacks don't use the `value` parameter, so the type change from `string | number` to `DropdownItemProps['value']` is compatible. The `popperProps` object `{ width: 'trigger' }` is compatible with the new `PopperOptions` type.

### Fix 2 — CSS class `pf-v5-c-dropdown` removed (line 208)
**Applied.** Removed the `pf-v5-c-dropdown` class from the `className` prop on `ResourceDropdown` at line 208, keeping only the custom `dropdown--full-width` class. The `pf-v5-c-dropdown` class was removed in v6 with no equivalent `pf-v6-c-dropdown` class.

### Fix 3 — Button icon children to prop (line 1009)
**No change needed.** The `<Button>` at line 1009 contains only text children (`{t('Save')}`), not an icon element. There is no icon to move to the `icon` prop.

### Fix 4 — MenuToggle icon children to prop (lines 362, 514, 766, 780)
**No change needed.** All four `<MenuToggle>` instances contain only text children (pool names, provider group names, or placeholder strings). None contain icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`.

### Fix 5 — Dropdown transitive behavioral changes (line 77)
**No change needed.** This is an informational warning about Popper's `appendTo` default changing from `'inline'` to `() => document.body`. The file contains no tests; the Dropdown usage in this file is not affected since all dropdowns already use `popperProps={{ width: 'trigger' }}` and don't rely on the default `appendTo` behavior.

### Fix 6 — CSS class `pf-v5-c-dropdown` removed (line 208)
**Applied.** Same location as Fix 2 — both rules target the same `pf-v5-c-dropdown` class reference at line 208. Handled in a single edit.
